required_evidence: Leave-one-team-out comparison of state+causal kinematics+safety versus same baseline plus D_comp/D_yield; within-fold scenario+area residualization; safe-subset agreement
pass_condition: Full model improves prespecified held-out metric over baseline and at least two safe subsets agree in IPV direction
reviewer_gate: G0R-COND-001; freeze reviewer; red-team review; independent reproduction

required_evidence: Outcome-free support/OOD/abstention map using Gate 0 thresholds

required_evidence: Conditional versus scalar/marginal summaries using training-fold-only preprocessing
pass_condition: State-conditioned summaries directionally align with primary comparison

required_evidence: Directional tails versus absolute, p90, max, onset, persistence, and alternative windows
pass_condition: Sensitivity/discovery results align after FDR control; failures logged in tried.md

required_evidence: S1, S2, and S3 outcome-independent safe subsets
pass_condition: At least two safe subsets agree in IPV direction before primary conclusion
Directionally compatible with leave-one-team-out; no significance headline replacement
